import: import { Button, Input, Select, Textarea, FormField } from '../components/ui';

primary_cta.description: Botão primário CTA com ícone (6 arquivos, 6 instâncias)
primary_cta.before: className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"
primary_cta.notes: Variante 'primary' é o default, size 'md' é o default

primary_with_loading.description: Botão Salvar/Submit com estado de loading (4 arquivos, 4 instâncias)
primary_with_loading.before: className="flex-1 inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:bg-gray-400 font-medium text-sm"
primary_with_loading.notes: Remover o ternário {loading ? 'Salvando...' : 'Salvar'} — isLoading cuida disso

secondary_cancel.before: className="px-4 py-2.5 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50"

icon_view.before: className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"

icon_view_sm.description: Ícone de visualização pequeno (Templates grid cards)

icon_edit.before: className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-amber-600 hover:bg-amber-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"

icon_edit_sm.description: Ícone de edição pequeno (Templates grid cards)

icon_delete.before: className="p-2 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 rounded-lg transition-colors"

icon_delete_sm.description: Ícone de exclusão pequeno (Templates grid cards)

export.before: className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-emerald-600 text-white px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-emerald-700 transition-colors font-medium text-sm"

primary_sm.description: Botão primário pequeno — Enviar campanha, Adicionar interação
primary_sm.before: className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-lg text-xs font-medium hover:bg-indigo-700"

primary_sm_disabled.description: Botão Adicionar com disabled por estado (Visitantes detalhes)
primary_sm_disabled.before: className="px-4 py-2 bg-indigo-600 text-white rounded-lg text-sm font-medium hover:bg-indigo-700 disabled:bg-gray-300"

pagination.before: className="p-2 rounded-lg border border-gray-200 hover:bg-gray-50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"

tab_filter.description: Botões de filtro tab (Templates canal, Relatorios tipo)
tab_filter.notes: Padrão de tab — usar variant dinâmico

drift_templateeditor.description: DRIFT FIX: Botões do TemplateEditor usam blue-500 em vez de indigo-600
drift_templateeditor.before: className="flex-1 bg-blue-500 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded-md hover:bg-blue-600 disabled:bg-gray-400 font-medium"

labeled_input.description: Input com label — padrão mais comum (modais de formulário)
labeled_input.before_input: <input value={...} onChange={...} placeholder="..." className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" />
labeled_input.after:
<FormField label="Campo" htmlFor="campo" required>
  <Input id="campo" value={...} onChange={...} placeholder="..." />
</FormField>

labeled_select.before_select: <select value={...} onChange={...} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500">

labeled_textarea.before_textarea: <textarea value={...} onChange={...} rows={6} className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm font-mono focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" />
labeled_textarea.after:
<FormField label="Conteudo" htmlFor="conteudo" required>
  <Textarea id="conteudo" value={...} onChange={...} rows={6} className="font-mono" />
</FormField>
labeled_textarea.notes: Passar className='font-mono' para manter estilo do conteúdo

filter_select_no_label.description: Select de filtro sem label (Visitantes, Agendamentos)
filter_select_no_label.before: <select value={filtroCategoria} onChange={...} className="px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500">
filter_select_no_label.notes: Sem FormField — o Select standalone herda os estilos base automaticamente

date_input_no_label.before: <input type="date" value={...} onChange={...} className="px-3 py-2 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500" />
date_input_no_label.notes: Sem FormField para inputs de filtro inline. Adicionar className='w-auto' para não expandir para 100%

search_input_with_icon.description: Input de busca com ícone absoluto (pl-10)
search_input_with_icon.before_icon: <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-gray-400" />
search_input_with_icon.before_input: <input type="text" placeholder="Buscar..." value={busca} onChange={...} className="w-full pl-10 pr-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-indigo-500 focus:border-transparent" />
search_input_with_icon.notes: Manter o wrapper div e o ícone absoluto. Usar className='pl-10' no Input para padding personalizado

labeled_input_xs.description: Input de label pequeno (Campanhas segmentação, Templates preview variables)
labeled_input_xs.before_input: <input value={...} onChange={...} placeholder="..." className="w-full px-2 py-1.5 border border-gray-200 rounded-lg text-sm" />
labeled_input_xs.after:
<FormField label="Campo" htmlFor="campo">
  <Input id="campo" value={...} onChange={...} placeholder="..." />
</FormField>
labeled_input_xs.notes: FormField usa text-xs para labels por padrão — compatível

drift_templateeditor_input.description: DRIFT FIX: Inputs do TemplateEditor usam rounded-md em vez de rounded-lg
drift_templateeditor_input.before: className="w-full px-3 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-md focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500"
